name: Plastic Easter Eggs 200pc - Spritz™
description:
Get ready for endless Easter fun with the Plastic Easter Eggs 200pc from Spritz™. This bulk pack includes 200 colorful plastic eggs, perfect for egg hunts, decorations and party favors. These durable eggs are easy to fill with treats or small toys, making them a must-have for your Easter celebrations. Convenient and reusable, they ensure you have plenty of eggs for all your festive activities.

Spritz™: Pops of joy that make the moment™
